subcodes.first_line: O ye two pure-natured sisters! I pray to God that ye those two sisters, like unto two heavenly stars, may shine upon the horizon of the Love of God
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو خواهر پاک گهر از خدا خواهم که آن دو خواهر مانند دو اختر فرقدان در افق
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
